articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Ivermectin Cancer Research — Agency Sits on Life-Saving Drug Data
articles.summary: New report exposes CIA's half-century suppression of research on ivermectin and other repurposed drugs for cancer treatment. The intelligence agency deliberately withheld potentially life-saving therapeutic data while Americans died from diseases these cheap, off-patent medications could treat.

articles.title: FDA Labels Hide Deadly Truth — Acetaminophen Safer Than Ibuprofen Despite Industry Fear Campaign
articles.summary: Analysis reveals FDA's liability fears prevent honest comparative safety warnings on pain medications. Despite acetaminophen's narrow therapeutic window, ibuprofen's systematic organ damage makes it more dangerous — but drug labels won't tell patients the truth.

articles.title: Rice University Scientist Gets 15-Year Ban — But Research Fraud Took 17 Years to Punish
articles.summary: Office of Research Integrity finally bans chemist Ariel Fernández for data fabrication, but the misconduct occurred in 2009. The glacial pace of accountability shows how broken the research integrity system has become when fraudsters get nearly two decades of career protection.

articles.title: Psychiatry Protects Paxil Fraud Paper — 'Expression of Concern' Pathetic Response to Massive Settlement
articles.summary: Despite GSK paying massive settlements for Paxil safety fraud, psychiatric journals refuse to retract misleading safety papers. Consumers who suffered from hidden suicide risks get only an 'expression of concern' while the fraudulent research remains in the literature.

articles.title: Biden Officials Deliberately Buried COVID Vaccine Safety Signals — VAERS Data Suppressed
articles.summary: Sen. Ron Johnson's investigation reveals Biden administration health officials systematically ignored VAERS safety signals and suppressed COVID vaccine adverse event data. The deliberate suppression endangered millions while officials publicly claimed the shots were 'safe and effective.'

articles.title: Vaccine Mandates Built on Fear and Legal Coercion — New Book Exposes Century of Medical Tyranny
articles.summary: Investigation reveals historical pattern of vaccine enforcement through manufactured fear campaigns, from 1853 Vaccination Act through Jacobson v. Massachusetts to modern mandates. The Cutter Incident of 1955 shows how rushed approvals and corporate capture create ongoing public health disasters.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Gets Retraction — Paper Mills Infiltrate IEEE Proceedings
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher faces retraction while paper mill advertisements contaminate prestigious IEEE scientific proceedings. The corruption of peer review reaches new depths as fake research operations openly advertise in legitimate academic venues.

articles.title: Robert Malone Warns: AI Creates 'Synformation' — Truth Becomes Impossible Under Epistemic Capture
articles.summary: COVID censorship architect warns artificial intelligence enables 'synformation' — the merger of information warfare with AI-powered narrative control. As epistemic capture meets machine learning, independent scientific thought faces extinction through algorithmic suppression.

articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Ivermectin Cancer Research — Who Else Was Silenced?
articles.summary: Explosive report reveals CIA suppressed five decades of research on drugs like ivermectin and their anti-cancer properties. The intelligence agency's systematic concealment of therapeutic research represents institutional capture of medical knowledge that could have saved countless lives.

articles.title: FDA Hides Painkiller Truth: Acetaminophen Beats Ibuprofen But Labels Won't Say Why
articles.summary: Despite acetaminophen being generally safer than ibuprofen due to COX inhibition dangers, FDA regulatory capture and liability fears prevent honest comparative safety information on drug labels. The agency's per-drug mandate serves pharma profits over patient safety.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Gets Retraction — Academic Fraud Machine Keeps Rolling
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher faces retraction as paper mill advertisements infiltrate IEEE proceedings. The academic publishing cartel's corruption continues unchecked while critical cancer research credibility crumbles under institutional rot.

articles.title: Psychiatry Protects Paxil Fraud: 'Expression of Concern' for Consumers, Profits for Pharma
articles.summary: Despite massive legal settlements over Paxil safety lies, psychiatric journals refuse to retract misleading safety papers. Consumers get meaningless 'expressions of concern' while pharma-captured psychiatry shields dangerous antidepressant research from scrutiny.

articles.title: Biden Admin Deliberately Ignored COVID Vaccine Injuries — Sen. Johnson Report Exposes Cover-Up
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's investigation reveals Biden health officials systematically suppressed VAERS safety signals and buried COVID vaccine side effect data. The administration's willful blindness to vaccine injuries represents criminal negligence disguised as public health policy.

articles.title: Neuralink Whistleblower: Virus-Infected Monkeys Attacked Staff in Musk's Brain Experiments
articles.summary: Former Neuralink employee reveals brutal monkey attacks involving virus-infected animals during Elon Musk's brain implant experiments. The lawsuit exposes dangerous working conditions and potential biohazard cover-ups in the rush to commercialize neural interfaces.

articles.title: Epistemic Capture Meets AI: How Information War Became Automated Thought Control
articles.summary: Robert Malone exposes how artificial intelligence amplifies epistemic capture, creating 'synformation' that systematically suppresses dissenting scientific voices. The marriage of AI censorship and institutional capture represents the ultimate threat to independent medical research.

articles.title: Medical Establishment Attacks CDC Panel for Allowing Patient Choice on Vaccines
articles.summary: ACIP faces vicious backlash from pharma-captured medical establishment for daring to suggest 'shared decision-making' between doctors and patients. The coordinated attack reveals how deeply the system fears any crack in vaccine mandate orthodoxy.

articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Research on Ivermectin's Cancer-Fighting Properties
articles.summary: For half a century, the CIA deliberately concealed research showing ivermectin and similar drugs have anti-cancer properties. This systematic suppression kept life-saving treatments away from millions while Big Pharma developed expensive alternatives. The intelligence apparatus actively worked against public health to protect pharmaceutical profits.

articles.title: FDA Labels Hide Truth: Acetaminophen Actually Safer Than Ibuprofen
articles.summary: Despite clear evidence that ibuprofen causes systemic damage to stomach, heart, and kidneys while acetaminophen doesn't, the FDA's labeling policies obscure this critical safety difference. The agency's liability fears and per-drug mandate prevent comparative safety information that could save lives.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Hit With Retraction as Paper Mills Infiltrate Elite Journals
articles.summary: A prominent cancer researcher faces retraction while paper mill advertisements are found paired with IEEE proceedings. The corruption of scientific publishing reaches the highest levels as fraudulent research contaminated cancer treatment protocols.

articles.title: Psychiatry Refuses to Retract Fraudulent Paxil Safety Paper Despite $3 Billion Settlement
articles.summary: Even after GlaxoSmithKline paid billions for hiding Paxil's dangers, psychiatric journals won't retract the misleading safety studies that enabled the fraud. Consumers get an worthless 'expression of concern' while the poisonous literature remains to mislead future doctors.

articles.title: Biden Officials Deliberately Ignored VAERS Safety Signals, Suppressed Vaccine Injury Data
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's report reveals Biden administration health officials systematically ignored vaccine adverse event reporting system alerts and actively suppressed COVID vaccine side effect data. The cover-up endangered millions while officials pushed universal mandates.

articles.title: Robert Malone Exposes 'Synformation': How AI Amplifies Epistemic Capture
articles.summary: Dr. Robert Malone reveals how artificial intelligence systems are being weaponized to create 'synformation' - the systematic distortion of scientific truth through epistemic capture. AI doesn't just censor; it manufactures false consensus while burying legitimate research.

articles.title: Medical Establishment Attacks CDC Panel for Allowing Patient Choice in Vaccines
articles.summary: The Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices faces vicious attacks from pharma-captured medical organizations simply for suggesting 'shared decision-making' between doctors and patients. The establishment demands complete compliance, not informed consent.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictments May Finally Crack Washington's Wall of Scientific Secrecy
articles.summary: Criminal charges related to COVID response could break open the government's systematic suppression of pandemic data and research. James Bovard reports on how legal accountability might force transparency in the agencies that buried inconvenient scientific truths.

This systematic burial of potentially life-saving research protected Big Pharma's trillion-dollar oncology monopoly while patients died from lack of access to cheap, effective treatments.

articles.title: FDA Labels Hide That Acetaminophen Beats Ibuprofen on Safety — Liability Fears Trump Truth
articles.summary: Despite acetaminophen being safer than ibuprofen for most people, the FDA refuses comparative safety labeling due to liability concerns and regulatory capture. Drug companies profit from keeping consumers ignorant about relative risks of COX inhibition damage.

articles.summary: Another leading cancer researcher faces retraction while paper mills infiltrate IEEE proceedings and academic integrity collapses. The replication crisis claims another scalp as fraudulent research poisons the entire medical literature pipeline.

articles.summary: Sen. Ron Johnson's report exposes how Biden health officials systematically suppressed VAERS safety signals and buried COVID vaccine injury data. The administration prioritized narrative control over patient safety, leaving Americans uninformed about real risks.

articles.summary: New federal indictments over COVID fraud may finally expose the government's systematic suppression of scientific dissent. Washington's secrecy apparatus that buried inconvenient research and silenced whistleblowers faces its first real legal challenge.
